ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the state (e.g., '08' for Colorado) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "area_mi2" TEXT /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the city (e.g., '00870' for Air Force Academy) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the city belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "area_mi2" TEXT /* Area of the city in square miles */,
  "elevation_m" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in meters */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the county (e.g., '041' for El Paso) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the county belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "area_mi2" TEXT /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_county_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city in the association */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county in the association */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association (e.g., 'county seat', 'largest city') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_county_associations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_county_associations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., GIS analyst, data scientist, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., 'state', 'city', 'county') */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "data" TEXT /* The actual data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "num_accesses" INTEGER /* Number of times the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
